parser_claim: The runtime creates this label only inside an OpinionStanceFrame and recognizes two profiles: bare 有/冇 as existential-domain omission and 係/唔係, optionally preceded by one subject, as copular-complement omission.
source_proposition: The helper marks a typed missing slot as unresolved and context-required while retaining the visible tokens.
implementation_effect: Split existential-domain omission from copular/response analyses and preserve the embedding stance frame.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the implementation’s missing-slot name as independently established syntax.

parser_claim: Five non-held-out accepted snapshots contain ComplementEllipsisFragment: 我都覺得有, 我都覺得佢係, 我都覺得係, 我都覺得係啊, and 我覺得唔係.
source_proposition: All five are wrapped as NeedsContext and retain an unresolved existential_domain or copular_complement slot.
implementation_effect: Preserve review-bearing status during any later representation change.
forbidden_inference: Accepted snapshots are not linguistic attestations or proof of the runtime analysis.

parser_claim: The current trace correctly avoids fabricating omitted complement words, but it assigns one analysis before discourse evidence is available.
source_proposition: The parser records antecedent_status not_observed and discourse_license_not_observed.
implementation_effect: Keep absence and uncertainty explicit while allowing multiple candidate analyses.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert a noun, proposition, VP, or copular complement as an overt token.

parser_claim: Adult Cantonese permits an existential 有 utterance with an understood domain.
source_proposition: 仲有 is translated as “There are still some (there),” with the existential domain understood from context.
implementation_effect: Support a narrow discourse-linked existential-domain omission subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every bare 有, every embedded 有, or every 有 after a stance predicate has this analysis.

parser_claim: Cantonese null objects are constrained by prior mention or contextual recoverability, not licensed merely by surface brevity.
source_proposition: The reply 我鍾意 omits an object whose referent is supplied by the preceding discourse.
implementation_effect: Require a compatible discourse antecedent for a null-object analysis and distinguish it from existential-domain omission.
forbidden_inference: Do not adopt the paper’s null-topic representation as the parser’s only ontology.

parser_claim: 覺得 can select propositional content, but that fact alone does not decide the internal structure of a short following form.
exact_locator: printed p. 42 and inherited cognition-predicate examples
source_proposition: The synopsis treats cognition predicates including 覺得 as taking a proposition.
implementation_effect: Preserve the stance predicate and content relation while keeping the content analysis defeasible.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer exact complement ellipsis from general proposition selection.

parser_claim: No inspected source directly attests the exact embedded runtime strings 我都覺得有, 我都覺得佢係, 我都覺得係, or 我覺得唔係 with the runtime’s typed missing-complement analysis.
source_proposition: Related response, null-object, existential, and cognition facts are sourced, but the exact embedded profiles remain unverified.
implementation_effect: Keep the exact forms context-required and unpromoted.
forbidden_inference: A direct-source gap is not a grammaticality rejection.

parser_claim: 係 and 唔係 have independently documented response-particle uses.
source_proposition: 係 is analyzed as a positive response particle with 唔係 as its negative counterpart; exact 係啊 responses are documented.
implementation_effect: Allow a response/propositional-anaphor candidate rather than forcing copular complement omission.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every syntactic 係 or 唔係 as a response particle.

parser_claim: Pedagogical dialogue material independently uses 係/係呀 and 唔係 as agreement or disagreement responses.
exact_locator: printed p. 219, 傳意項目介紹：同意
source_proposition: The table pairs an assertion with 係呀 as agreement and gives 我就話唔係喎 as disagreement.
implementation_effect: Preserve particle and polarity identity; do not mechanically create a missing nominal complement.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer corpus frequency, universal final-particle interchangeability, or embedded 覺得 compatibility.

parser_claim: Copular syntax and response-particle syntax can share the visible form 係/唔係.
source_proposition: The runtime currently treats all selected short forms as copular complement omission, while external sources establish a response use.
implementation_effect: Store competing analyses until discourse and surrounding syntax resolve them.
forbidden_inference: Do not erase an overt subject in 佢係 or assume it establishes a complete copular clause.

parser_claim: General VP ellipsis is selectively licensed by particular heads and is not the same phenomenon as every short response or omitted nominal/domain.
source_proposition: Cantonese auxiliaries and some 有/冇/未 uses license VP ellipsis, whereas progressive 喺度 and several aspectual heads do not.
implementation_effect: Represent licensed VP ellipsis separately from existential-domain, copular-complement, and null-object omission.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the paper to validate the runtime’s exact 覺得+係/有 fragments.

parser_claim: Cantonese auxiliaries may stand without an overt VP only under ellipsis, and auxiliary inventories are heterogeneous.
source_proposition: Core auxiliaries generally do not take NP objects or stand alone except where an understood complement is licensed.
implementation_effect: Keep auxiliary ellipsis as a lexeme/use-specific subtype rather than a generic fragment rule.
forbidden_inference: Do not extend auxiliary behavior to copulas, existential predicates, or every action verb.

parser_claim: Bare 有/冇 must be separated from aspectual or auxiliary 有/冇 plus VP ellipsis and from ordinary existential/possessive readings.
source_proposition: The paper’s licensing examples involve aspectual/perfective 有/冇 with an elided VP, not an unspecified existential nominal domain.
implementation_effect: Require head-use and omitted-constituent classification before assigning a subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse all 有/冇 ellipsis into one existential construction.

parser_claim: A future analysis should record overt material, omission type, discourse antecedent status, and competing response/copy analyses independently.
source_proposition: The sources support multiple omission mechanisms and homophonous response forms, not one constructional node.
implementation_effect: Realign the wrapper into typed omission/anaphora metadata over ordinary predicates or responses.
forbidden_inference: Do not delete visible 係/唔係/有/冇 or turn inferred content into surface tokens.

parser_claim: The best-supported disposition is a split among existential-domain omission, response particles/propositional anaphora, copular complement omission if later evidenced, null arguments, and selectively licensed VP ellipsis.
source_proposition: Only the existential domain and general discourse-recoverability core are directly supported for closely related surfaces; exact embedded profiles remain gaps.
implementation_effect: Retain as a review-bearing remediation target, not supported_productive grammar.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer impossibility from unresolved exact forms or fixture success from evidence absence.

parser_claim: The generative runtime template labels any single token categorized as action_verb as IntransitiveVP and records no object slot.
source_proposition: The rule uses category membership rather than lexeme-specific valency or discourse analysis.
implementation_effect: Replace generic action_verb recognition with lexeme/use-specific valency and omission diagnostics.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer inherent intransitivity from absence of a following token.

parser_claim: Four non-held-out accepted snapshots contain IntransitiveVP: three with 笑 and one with 同意, all nested inside clause-linking structures.
source_proposition: The label is never the only evidence for the full sentence and occurs under larger relations.
implementation_effect: Preserve outer clause relations while revising the inner valency analysis.
forbidden_inference: Accepted fixture reach does not prove a single linguistic class containing 笑 and 同意.

parser_claim: The accepted 笑 cases are analyzed as one-place event predicates solely because no object follows.
source_proposition: The parser does not consult a lexeme valency source or distinguish optional complements.
implementation_effect: Keep 笑 as a narrow candidate while seeking exact lexical evidence.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from 笑 to every action_verb.

parser_claim: The accepted 同意 case is also labeled IntransitiveVP despite its contextually supplied propositional content.
exact_locator: regression case 71: 如果你覺得佢啱，我就同意
source_proposition: The conditional antecedent supplies the proposition with which the speaker agrees.
implementation_effect: Represent 同意 as a predicate with discourse-linked propositional content rather than automatically as inherently intransitive.
forbidden_inference: Do not fabricate the proposition as an overt complement.

parser_claim: Cantonese distinguishes intransitive, transitive, and ditransitive VP patterns.
source_proposition: The synopsis explicitly gives VP→V, VP→V NP, and ditransitive patterns and states that Cantonese verbs can belong to these valency classes.
implementation_effect: Use lexeme/use-specific valency evidence instead of one generic action-verb class.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the synopsis as an exhaustive modern valency lexicon.

parser_claim: A one-verb surface can be a transitive predicate with a discourse-recoverable null object.
source_proposition: 我鍾意 is analyzed descriptively as “I like (it),” with the object recoverable from prior discourse.
implementation_effect: Test discourse and lexical valency before assigning an intransitive label.
forbidden_inference: Do not assume every objectless verb contains a null object or adopt one silent-topic analysis universally.

parser_claim: Null arguments require a compatible antecedent or recoverable context.
source_proposition: The paper explicitly conditions adult Cantonese null objects on prior mention or contextual recoverability and gives 放(喺)呢度 and 要買 examples.
implementation_effect: Record antecedent status and omitted role without inserting tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not use mere object absence as sufficient evidence for either null-object or intransitive analysis.

parser_claim: 同意 can take a proposition supplied by the preceding discourse rather than an overt following NP.
exact_locator: printed p. 219 and associated discussion prompt
source_proposition: The course asks whether the learner agrees with a stated proposition and presents agreement responses in that discourse frame.
implementation_effect: Classify 同意 by its semantic/content relation, not solely by surface token count.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every bare 同意 is licensed without context or that the textbook establishes one formal complement structure.

parser_claim: No inspected source directly establishes the exact accepted 笑 tokens as a dedicated Canto Span IntransitiveVP construction or supplies a complete valency entry for all runtime senses.
source_proposition: General VP valency is supported, but exact lexeme-level classification remains incomplete.
implementation_effect: Retain narrow lexical review status for 笑 rather than promoting a class template.
forbidden_inference: The gap is not evidence that 笑 is transitive or unacceptable.

parser_claim: Lexical valency and discourse omission are independent dimensions.
source_proposition: A lexeme may have one-place, transitive, optional-object, or context-omission uses; the visible one-token span does not resolve them.
implementation_effect: Store valency source, use subtype, and omission license separately.
forbidden_inference: Do not force one permanent transitivity label on every occurrence of a polysemous verb.

parser_claim: Auxiliary-supported ellipsis is not lexical intransitivity.
source_proposition: The synopsis notes that a clear main verb may be dropped with auxiliary support.
implementation_effect: Exclude auxiliary-only ellipsis from IntransitiveVP and map it through typed ellipsis.
forbidden_inference: Do not extend this auxiliary property to ordinary lexical verbs without evidence.

parser_claim: An omitted NP object and an omitted clausal/propositional complement must not be conflated.
exact_locator: R26 comparison of 我鍾意 and contextual 同意
source_proposition: The external evidence supports different recoverable content types, while the runtime records neither.
implementation_effect: Preserve omitted role and semantic type in future metadata.
forbidden_inference: Do not translate every omission as English “it” or invent a specific proposition.

parser_claim: The current node can remain only as a lexeme-backed one-place VP or an internal representation after argument structure has been established.
source_proposition: A bare surface and action_verb tag are insufficient, but independently sourced one-place uses may still warrant VP→V representation.
implementation_effect: Require a sourced valency entry or explicit unresolved status.
forbidden_inference: Do not retire genuine one-place predicates merely because null objects exist elsewhere.

parser_claim: The family does not authorize a hidden object for every objectless verb or an intransitive reading for every bare verb.
source_proposition: Both overgeneration directions are possible without lexical and discourse evidence.
implementation_effect: Keep unresolved cases review-bearing and surface-faithful.
forbidden_inference: Do not select an analysis simply to maximize parse completeness.

parser_claim: The best-supported disposition is to split sourced lexical one-place predicates from null-object, null-proposition, auxiliary-ellipsis, and optional-object uses, retiring the generic action_verb-only template.
source_proposition: General valency classes and constrained null objects are sourced; the runtime cross-product is not.
implementation_effect: Realign the label around sourced valency and typed omission while preserving larger clause structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not change runtime behavior during the research freeze.
